ddls:
CREATE TABLE "waste_types" (
  "waste_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste type */,
  "waste_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the waste type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the waste type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the waste type was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the waste type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waste_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (for subcategories) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_entries" (
  "waste_entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste entry */,
  "waste_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waste type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the waste entry */,
  "reference_property" TEXT /* Reference property (e.g., Mass) */,
  "reference_property_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the reference property (e.g., kg) */,
  "mass" TEXT /* Mass of the waste entry */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the waste entry */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the waste was generated */,
  "collected_date" TEXT /* Date when the waste was collected */,
  "disposed_date" TEXT /* Date when the waste was disposed */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the waste entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the waste entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waste_entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_entries_waste_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("waste_type_id") REFERENCES waste_types ("waste_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_entries_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_properties" (
  "reference_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference property */,
  "reference_property_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the reference property (e.g., kg, m³) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the reference property was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the reference property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "waste_entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waste entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the waste data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the waste data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_waste_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("waste_entry_id") REFERENCES waste_entries ("waste_entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_disposal_methods" (
  "disposal_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposal method */,
  "disposal_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the disposal method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disposal method */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the disposal method was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the disposal method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposal_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_disposal_entries" (
  "disposal_entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposal entry */,
  "waste_entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waste entry being disposed */,
  "disposal_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disposal method used */,
  "disposed_date" TEXT /* Date when the waste was disposed */,
  "disposed_amount" TEXT /* Amount of waste disposed */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the disposal entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the disposal entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposal_entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_disposal_entries_disposal_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("disposal_method_id") REFERENCES waste_disposal_methods ("disposal_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_disposal_entries_waste_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("waste_entry_id") REFERENCES waste_entries ("waste_entry_id")
)
